creator: gahr@gahr.ch
text:
Ralf,

I'm not questioning your competence, and I apologize if I gave you this
impression.

The fact remain that this is a local problem of yours. I cannot
reproduce it here. I have taken the following steps to make sure that
nothing is wrong with the tarball / install procedure. I'm open to
suggestions if you think I missed the point.

1) check permissions in the extracted tarball
   > find work/tuxguitar-src-1.2 -type d -perm 700
   > (no output)

2) check permissions in the installed directory
   > find /usr/local/share/tuxguitar/ -type d -perm 700
   > (no output)

3) check my settings
   > umask
   22
   > sudo umask
   0022
   > check intermediate directories
   > stat /usr/local/share/
   92 730245 drwxr-xr-x 125 root wheel 3218080 2560 "Oct 13 09:17:23
   2010" "Oct 13 09:13:32 2010" "Oct 13 09:13:32 2010" "Jul 19 09:13:44
   2010" 16384 8 0 /usr/local/share/
   > stat /usr/local/share/tuxguitar/
   92 1390539 drwxr-xr-x 7 root wheel 5564111 512 "Oct 13 09:15:45 2010"
   "Oct 13 09:13:32 2010" "Oct 13 09:13:32 2010" "Oct 13 09:13:32 2010"
   16384 4 0 /usr/local/share/tuxguitar/

-- 
Pietro Cerutti
The FreeBSD Project
gahr@FreeBSD.org

PGP Public Key:
http://gahr.ch/pgp
